gamestr.heroDescription: Discover independent games, compete on cryptographically verified Gamestr.io leaderboards, and carry one Nostr identity across the arcade. No platform account required.
gamestr.siteTitle: Gamestr — play free, own your score
gamestr.siteDescription: The Nostr-native arcade for independent games, verified Gamestr.io scores, signed challenges, and direct Lightning zaps.
gamestr.footerDescription: An open arcade surface for Gamestr.io scores. Scores live on Nostr; games live wherever their creators choose.

600.heroDescription: Pallasite, Neon Sentinel and Hang On, Fren — a small, strange arcade with verified Gamestr.io scores and no platform account.
600.siteTitle: 600 Billion Arcade — three games, one enormous number
600.siteDescription: Play Pallasite, Neon Sentinel and Hang On, Fren in the 600 Billion Arcade, with verified Gamestr.io scores and direct Lightning zaps.
600.footerDescription: A small, strange arcade showing Gamestr.io scores. Scores live on Nostr; games stay with their creators.
